creator: jean-sebastien.roy@wanadoo.fr
text:
>The maintainer of math/mupad sent me patch to update it to 2.0 and I'm
>planning to commit it.

Fine.

>Your mupad2 port looks quite similar to
>existing version for me.

Similar to the mupad port ? Of course. Only differences are in the patches and few lines in the makefile.

>o Did you ask math/mupad maintainer to update it?

No, because I needed it now, so I did it for me and submitted it in hope it could be useful.

>o Do you have good reason to create new port over updating existing one?

Mupad 1.4 and 2.0 are quite different beasts, and v 2.0 is still not available on some platforms (eg. Mac), so I (in fact the users I'm made this port for) needed to be able to install both at the time. It's probably not relevant for the ports collection, so a patch to the previous port is probably better than a new port.

regards,

js
